stages.name: Fundamentals
stages.objective: Understand core concepts and vocabulary for general IT automation.

stages.name: Diagnostics
stages.objective: Learn safe read-only checks and signals for general IT automation.

stages.name: Remediation
stages.objective: Learn reversible fixes and escalation points for general IT automation.

stages.name: Verification
stages.objective: Learn how to confirm that general IT automation work is actually resolved.
